title: Our Doctors
metaTitle: Our Doctors | Orange Children Hospital Ahmedabad
metaDescription: Meet our team of expert doctors, neonatologists, pediatric surgeons, and super-specialists dedicated to providing the best pediatric critical care in Ahmedabad.

sections.description: This is the section populated with all 13 Orange Children Hospital doctors.

content.title: Meet Our People
content.subtitle: service with a smile
content.description: Our team of doctors possesses clinical understanding and expertise in their fields, allowing them to diagnose and treat every patient efficiently. Every patient is unique to them; thus, they choose a treatment strategy based on the desired type.

members.name: Dr. Sagar Patel
members.designation: Fellowship in Neonatology (I.A.P.), Pediatric Critical Care (Mumbai), Neonatologist and Pediatric Intensivist
members.bio: Dr. Sagar Patel has years of comprehensive clinical pediatric experience, specializing in advanced neonatal critical care and respiratory support structures.

members.name: Dr. Nirav Patel
members.designation: Fellowship in Neonatology (N.N.F.), M.B.B.S, D.Ped., Neonatologist and Pediatric Intensivist
members.bio: Dr. Nirav Patel is dedicated to exceptional newborn care, special handling for high-risk neonates, and continuous developmental therapy monitoring.

members.name: Dr. Sunil Patel
members.bio: Dr. Sunil Patel specializes in critical child health diagnostics and comprehensive neonatal intensive care, ensuring safe outcomes for high-risk babies.

members.name: Dr. Maulik Patel
members.bio: Dr. Maulik Patel is a dedicated pediatrician and intensivist, providing specialist clinical support in managing complex neonatal and pediatric intensive care cases.

members.name: Dr. Tejas Shah
members.designation: M.D. Pediatrics, Pediatric Intensive Care Medicine (UK), Fellowship in Pediatric Bronchoscopy (USA), Neonatologist & Pediatric Intensivist
members.bio: Dr. Tejas Shah is a highly distinguished intensivist with specialized international fellowships in pediatric critical care and advanced bronchoscopy.

members.name: Dr. Bhavik Shah
members.bio: Dr. Bhavik Shah has extensive expertise in pediatric outpatient and inpatient care, critical neonatologist consultations, and infant emergency management.

members.name: Dr. Divyesh Sadadiwala
members.bio: Dr. Divyesh Sadadiwala is a highly specialized pediatric cardiologist, dedicated to diagnosing and treating heart conditions in infants, children, and young adults.

members.name: Dr. Vaibhav Shah
members.bio: Dr. Vaibhav Shah is a leading pediatric hemato-oncologist, specializing in the diagnosis and comprehensive treatment of blood disorders and pediatric cancers.

members.name: Dr. Urvish Parikh
members.designation: M.Ch in Pediatric Surgery & M.S in General Surgery, Pediatric Surgeon
members.bio: Dr. Urvish Parikh is an expert pediatric surgeon with advanced training in performing complex medico-surgical operations for neonates and young children.

members.name: Dr. Harsh Patel
members.bio: Dr. Harsh Patel specializes in pediatric neurology, providing expert evaluation and treatments for pediatric neuromuscular disorders, epilepsy, and developmental delays.

members.name: Dr. Ruchi Shah
members.bio: Dr. Ruchi Shah is an experienced pediatric endocrinologist, specializing in the management of juvenile diabetes, growth disorders, and thyroid issues in kids.

members.name: Dr. Maulik Patel (Ortho)
members.bio: Dr. Maulik Patel is a dedicated pediatric orthopedician, specializing in treating pediatric bone fractures, joint deformities, and congenital skeletal issues.

members.name: Dr. Kinisha Patel
members.designation: MD, DNB (Pediatrics), Fellowship in Pediatric Gastroenterology, Pediatric Gastroenterologist
members.bio: Dr. Kinisha Patel is a highly skilled pediatric gastroenterologist, offering expert care in digestive system disorders and nutrition management in children.
